buckets.raw-transformable: h2bc may infer this block from raw HTML when the source signal is deterministic and side-effect-free.
buckets.explicit-marker: h2bc may emit this block only when source markup names the exact WordPress concept through an explicit marker.
buckets.compiler-only: A higher-level compiler may choose this block when it has site, template, query, or content-model intent; h2bc must not infer it from raw rendered HTML.
buckets.dynamic-unsupported: Runtime or site-data blocks that are not raw HTML transform targets for h2bc.
buckets.legacy-or-internal: Legacy, editor-internal, compatibility, or fallback blocks that should not drive new raw transforms.
buckets.future-candidate: A deterministic static transform may be possible later, but no transform ships today.

core/accordion.rationale: Static disclosure markup may be transformable later, but no conservative accordion transform ships today.

core/accordion-heading.rationale: Accordion child markup needs a parent accordion contract before h2bc can emit it safely.

core/accordion-item.rationale: Accordion item output needs a complete static accordion transform, not isolated child inference.

core/accordion-panel.rationale: Accordion panel output needs a complete static accordion transform, not isolated child inference.

core/archives.rationale: Archives require runtime site data and archive query intent.

core/audio.rationale: Audio elements with static sources map directly to core/audio.

core/avatar.rationale: Avatar output requires author or commenter identity context.

core/block.rationale: Reusable block references require a persistent block ref chosen outside raw HTML.

core/breadcrumbs.rationale: Breadcrumbs require route, hierarchy, and site navigation context.

core/button.rationale: Native WordPress button anchors can become core/button children inside core/buttons.

core/buttons.rationale: Native WordPress button anchor groups can be inferred from existing block classes.

core/calendar.rationale: Calendar output is generated from site content and date state.

core/categories.rationale: Category listings require taxonomy data and display intent.

core/code.rationale: Preformatted code markup maps directly to core/code.

core/column.rationale: Column children are emitted only inside a recognized columns transform.

core/columns.rationale: Explicit row/grid wrappers with direct column-like children are deterministic.

core/comment-author-name.rationale: Comment author fields require comment-loop context.

core/comment-date.rationale: Comment date output requires comment-loop context.

core/comment-edit-link.rationale: Comment edit links require comment identity and permission context.

core/comment-reply-link.rationale: Comment reply links require threaded-comment runtime context.

core/comments.rationale: Comments require comment-query context and runtime state.

core/comments-pagination.rationale: Comments pagination depends on comment query state.

core/comments-pagination-next.rationale: Comments pagination links depend on comment query state.

core/comments-pagination-numbers.rationale: Comments pagination numbers depend on comment query state.

core/comments-pagination-previous.rationale: Comments pagination links depend on comment query state.

core/comments-title.rationale: Comment titles depend on current post and comment query state.

core/cover.rationale: Cover-like wrappers with explicit static background signals can be inferred.

core/details.rationale: Native details/summary markup maps directly to core/details.

core/embed.rationale: Recognized provider iframes can be normalized into core/embed.

core/file.rationale: Downloadable file anchors with recognized extensions can be inferred.

core/footnotes.rationale: Footnotes require document-level references and editor-managed anchors.

core/freeform.rationale: Classic/freeform content is a compatibility block, not a new raw transform target.

core/gallery.rationale: Explicit gallery wrappers with multiple images can become core/gallery.

core/group.rationale: High-confidence semantic wrappers can become core/group without site context.

core/heading.rationale: Heading tags map directly to core/heading.

core/home-link.rationale: Home links require site URL and navigation intent.

core/html.rationale: Unsupported fragments are intentionally preserved as core/html fallback blocks.

core/icon.rationale: Static icon markup may be transformable later, but provider/icon identity rules are not defined yet.

core/image.rationale: Image elements and figures map directly to core/image.

core/latest-comments.rationale: Latest comments require runtime site data.

core/latest-posts.rationale: Latest posts require runtime site data and query intent.

core/legacy-widget.rationale: Legacy widget blocks represent old widget state, not raw HTML inference.

core/list.rationale: Ordered and unordered lists map directly to core/list.

core/list-item.rationale: List items are generated as children inside recognized list transforms.

core/loginout.rationale: Login/logout output depends on runtime authentication state.

core/math.rationale: Static math markup may be transformable later after a stable source-signal contract exists.

core/media-text.rationale: Explicit media-text wrappers with media plus content can be inferred.

core/missing.rationale: Missing blocks are editor recovery placeholders, not transform targets.

core/more.rationale: More markers are editor/content control comments rather than rendered HTML structures.

core/navigation.rationale: Native navigation blocks need editor-valid serialization and site/menu policy; rendered nav markup falls back to core/html.

core/navigation-link.rationale: Navigation links are native navigation children and are not emitted by default raw conversion.

core/navigation-overlay-close.rationale: Overlay controls are part of a navigation UI chosen by a compiler or editor.

core/navigation-submenu.rationale: Navigation submenus are native navigation children and are not emitted by default raw conversion.

core/nextpage.rationale: Page-break markers are editor/content control comments rather than rendered HTML structures.

core/page-list.rationale: Page lists require runtime site hierarchy data.

core/page-list-item.rationale: Page list items are generated from site hierarchy data.

core/paragraph.rationale: Plain text and paragraphs map directly to core/paragraph.

core/pattern.rationale: Patterns are emitted only from explicit data-bfb-pattern markers naming a pattern slug.

core/post-author.rationale: Post author output requires current post author context.

core/post-author-biography.rationale: Post author biography requires current post author context.

core/post-author-name.rationale: Post author name requires current post author context.

core/post-comments-count.rationale: Post comments count requires current post and comment state.

core/post-comments-form.rationale: Comment forms require current post, user, and discussion settings.

core/post-comments-link.rationale: Comments links require current post and comment state.

core/post-content.rationale: Post content requires current post/template context.

core/post-date.rationale: Post date requires current post context.

core/post-excerpt.rationale: Post excerpt requires current post context.

core/post-featured-image.rationale: Featured image requires current post media identity.

core/post-navigation-link.rationale: Post navigation links require adjacent post query context.

core/post-terms.rationale: Post terms require current post taxonomy data.

core/post-time-to-read.rationale: Time-to-read requires current post content analysis.

core/post-title.rationale: Post titles require current post/template context.

core/preformatted.rationale: Preformatted markup maps directly to core/preformatted when not code or verse.

core/pullquote.rationale: Explicit pullquote markup maps to core/pullquote.

core/query.rationale: Query blocks require loop intent and query arguments.

core/query-pagination-next.rationale: Query pagination links require query-loop state.

core/query-pagination-numbers.rationale: Query pagination numbers require query-loop state.

core/query-pagination-previous.rationale: Query pagination links require query-loop state.

core/quote.rationale: Blockquote markup maps directly to core/quote unless it carries a pullquote signal.

core/read-more.rationale: Read-more links require current post URL and excerpt/content policy.

core/rss.rationale: RSS output depends on external feed runtime data.

core/search.rationale: Search forms are runtime site interaction UI, not raw rendered-content inference.

core/separator.rationale: Horizontal rules map directly to core/separator.

core/shortcode.rationale: Recognized shortcode text maps directly to core/shortcode.

core/site-logo.rationale: Site logo requires site identity metadata.

core/site-tagline.rationale: Site tagline requires site identity metadata.

core/site-title.rationale: Site title requires site identity metadata.

core/social-link.rationale: Static social links may be transformable later with conservative provider detection.

core/social-links.rationale: Static social link groups need a conservative wrapper and provider-detection contract.

core/spacer.rationale: Empty explicit spacer elements with height can become core/spacer.

core/table.rationale: Static tables map directly to core/table.

core/tag-cloud.rationale: Tag clouds require runtime taxonomy data.

core/template-part.rationale: Template parts are emitted only from explicit data-bfb-template-part markers naming an area or slug.

core/term-count.rationale: Term counts require current term/query context.

core/term-description.rationale: Term descriptions require current term context.

core/term-name.rationale: Term names require current term context.

core/terms-query.rationale: Terms queries require taxonomy query intent and runtime term data.

core/text-columns.rationale: Text columns are legacy/editor compatibility, superseded by columns/group transforms.

core/verse.rationale: Explicit verse markup maps directly to core/verse.

core/video.rationale: Video elements with static sources map directly to core/video.

core/widget-group.rationale: Widget groups represent legacy widget-area compatibility, not raw content inference.
